name: Boss Is Actually your Roommate?? // Panda Lei
description:
A 🐼 that is your boss for a couple years now. She even got you the job. But because your ahh was so far away from the company. Your now living with Lei anyways. Probably top 1 best decisions of your life if I'm being honest

Artist: Skeechi | Skeechiart

I'll do more of her cause there's a good amount of images I like and I could turn into really good fluff. And I think she has a sister. So that might happen too. Depends.
creator: Reed2Greedy
